strategies.name: Fast long
strategies.description: Take long quickly with a cross smoke and flashes.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: fast long, smoke cross, flash over -> go A

notes: long doors fight matters a lot

strategies.name: Long short A
strategies.description: Pressure A from long and cat.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: long + short, smoke CT -> go A

strategies.name: Rush B tunnels
strategies.description: Fast burst from tunnels onto B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: group B tunnels, flash out -> go B

strategies.name: Mid to B
strategies.description: Come through mid doors pressure into B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take mid, smoke CT doors -> go B

meta.purpose: enter B through a second lane
goodWhen: good if 1 player knows the smoke
good if 2+ players will go mid

strategies.name: Fake B to A long
strategies.description: Show B pressure and rotate into long.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: show B tunnels -> rotate A long

meta.purpose: pull rotation before the real hit
goodWhen: good if the team will rotate together
notes: do not lose players in fake

strategies.name: Late long take
strategies.description: Take long later in the round and finish A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: late long, smoke cross -> go A

goodWhen: good if the team will wait for the timing

strategies.name: Silent B tunnels
strategies.description: Walk tunnels and pop onto B with one flash.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: walk walk B tunnels, popflash -> go B

goodWhen: good if the team can stay quiet

strategies.name: Short burst A
strategies.description: Take cat and burst onto A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: short explode, smoke CT -> go A

notes: AWP can punish if cat is slow

strategies.name: Xbox short A
strategies.description: Use xbox smoke to claim short and scale A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: smoke xbox, take short -> go A

notes: one player should watch lower tunnels push

strategies.name: Long control to split
strategies.description: Take long first, then add short players for A split.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take long 3, then 2 short -> go A, smoke CT

goodWhen: good if 2 players can take the second lane

strategies.name: Delayed B tunnels
strategies.description: Stay hidden and hit B after one minute.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide tunnels till 1:00, then -> go B, flash out

goodWhen: good if the team will wait for the timing
notes: one player can fake cat lightly

strategies.name: Mid split A
strategies.description: Use mid and cat pressure into A without full long fight.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid take xbox, smoke 3 short 2 mid doors -> go A

goodWhen: good if 2 players can take the second lane

strategies.name: Triple long
strategies.description: Commit three players to long control.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 3 long

strategies.name: Mid peek
strategies.description: Peek mid early for info or opening damage.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid peek

meta.purpose: get early info and fall back if needed
goodWhen: good if one teammate can trade
good if you have flash support

strategies.name: Tunnels push
strategies.description: Push tunnels to stop B buildup.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: push tunnels

meta.purpose: get early info and fall back if needed
goodWhen: good if one teammate can trade
good if you have flash support

strategies.name: Double B hold
strategies.description: Standard two-player B setup.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 B hold

notes: window and platform roles should be clear

strategies.name: A stack
strategies.description: Gamble extra bodies on A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: stack A

strategies.name: B retake
strategies.description: Delay B and prepare to retake with rotates.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: retake B

meta.purpose: save utility for the B retake
goodWhen: good if the team will save utility

strategies.name: Short control
strategies.description: Hold or fight for catwalk control.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: short control

notes: do not get isolated from site
works well with mid peek info

strategies.name: Double mid
strategies.description: Use two players to deny mid access.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: double mid

notes: rotate one off if no contact

strategies.name: Save setup
strategies.description: Play compact and trade-focused for economy.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: save setup

meta.purpose: protect weapons and avoid isolated duels
goodWhen: good if the team will not overpeek

strategies.name: Long pit anchor
strategies.description: Use pit to stabilize long after early contest.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: long hold pit + car

notes: mid must still be called quickly

strategies.name: B anti-rush
strategies.description: Prepare to stop a fast tunnels burst.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: B anti-rush window + platform

notes: first contact should fall into second player

strategies.name: Cat info push
strategies.description: Take early cat info with support.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: push short for info

meta.purpose: get early info and fall back if needed
goodWhen: good if one teammate can trade
good if you have flash support
